---
title: ""
page-layout: custom
---

```{r map}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(mapgl)
library(dplyr)
library(sf)
library(readr)
library(here)

metadata_path <- here::here("data", "metadata.csv")
if (file.exists(metadata_path)) {
  photos <- read_csv(metadata_path, show_col_types = FALSE) |>
    filter(!is.na(lat), !is.na(lon))
} else {
  photos <- tibble(
    id = character(0), title = character(0), date_approx = character(0),
    reef = character(0), lat = numeric(0), lon = numeric(0),
    thumbnail_url = character(0), page_url = character(0)
  )
}

photos_sf <- st_as_sf(photos, coords = c("lon", "lat"), crs = 4326)

photos_sf <- photos_sf |>
  mutate(popup_html = paste0(
    '<div style="font-family:Georgia,serif;min-width:180px;">',
    ifelse(!is.na(thumbnail_url) & nchar(thumbnail_url) > 0,
      paste0('<img src="', thumbnail_url, '" style="width:180px;aspect-ratio:4/3;object-fit:cover;display:block;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">'), ""),
    '<span style="font-family:monospace;font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#2A7F7F;">', date_approx, '</span>',
    '<p style="margin:0.25rem 0 0.1rem;font-weight:600;font-size:0.9rem;color:#0D1B2A;">',
    ifelse(!is.na(page_url), paste0('<a href="', page_url, '" target="_blank" style="color:#2A7F7F;">', title, '</a>'), title),
    '</p>',
    '<p style="margin:0;font-size:0.8rem;color:#5a6a7a;font-style:italic;">', ifelse(!is.na(reef), reef, ""), '</p>',
    '</div>'
  ))

m <- maplibre(
  style = carto_style("positron"),
  center = c(-77.4, 18.2),
  zoom = 2,
  width = "100vw",
  height = "80vh"
)

m <- m |>
  add_source(
    id = "photos",
    data = photos_sf,
    cluster = TRUE,
    cluster_max_zoom = 14,
    cluster_radius = 50
    ) |>
  add_circle_layer(
      id = "clusters",
      source = photos_sf,
      filter = list("has", "point_count"),
      circle_color = "#2A7F7F",
      circle_opacity = 1
    ) |>
    # ── Cluster count labels ─────────────────────────────────────────────
    add_symbol_layer(
      id = "cluster-count",
      source = photos_sf,
      filter = list("has", "point_count"),
      text_field = list("get", "point_count_abbreviated"),
      text_color = "#ffffff",
      text_size = 13
    ) |>
    # ── Individual points ────────────────────────────────────────────────
    add_circle_layer(
      id = "unclustered",
      source = photos_sf,
      filter = list("!", list("has", "point_count")),
      circle_color = "#2A7F7F",
      circle_radius = 6,
      circle_opacity = 0.7,
      circle_stroke_width = 1.5,
      circle_stroke_color = "#2A7F7F",
      popup = "popup_html"
    )
m
```
